title: Performance MC
description: This Mod Pack gives the best* Performance to Minecraft!
body:
# Performance MC
## Why Performance MC
This is an **ModPack** that is completely **optimized** and gives a **Vanilla Experiance**! 

Get the **best Fps** now! **Only one click!**

This modpack can be **used as a template** for other modpacks or **your own!**
Because it **contains** must have mods that **optimizes Minecraft!**

**Easy** to install! **Have fun!**

It doesn't give the most performance, cause it balances performance and functionality. This modpack is suppose to exist for everybody to use and create their own modpack from. So for example to give the most performance you need vulkanmod, but most mods doesn't support it so you won't get the fuctionality and everyone can't use it.
## How to install?
You can install any modpack using **Modrinth launcher**. 

You can **customize easily** and there is **no limit**.

## Features?
**Improves** Fps to the **maximum!**


**Completely customizability!**

**Vanilla Gameplay** Just like **without Mods!**

Only **one click** to **install!**

## Extra Info
**Have Fun!**

Support Me by **Downloading it!**
